[http://www.lol-class.com/ LoL-Class.com] |created= 2014-01-04 |disbanded= |trades= }}{{TOCRWI|2}} '''Cloud9 Eclipse''' is the European branch of the North American organization [[Cloud9]]. The team was formed when Cloud9 picked the roster of '''Apples is sour''', as that roster reached Rank 1 on the European Ranked 5v5 Challenger ladder. The team competed under the name '''Cloud9 HyperX Eclipse''', in representation of their sponsor [http://www.kingston.com/us/memory/hyperx/ Kingston HyperX]. == History == == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} == Organization == ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|staff=yes|newteam=yes}} {{listplayer|Charlie (Charlie Lipsie)|cn|Charlie Lipsie|'''Analyst'''|newteam=C9}} {{listplayersp|Jed|se|Robin Jedhammar|'''Manager'''|newteam=h2k}} {{Listplayer/End}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Videos == == Interviews == ===2014=== * January 12 - [http://cloth5.com/interview-with-cloud-9s-eu-team/ Interview with Cloud 9′s EU Team] ''with Cloth5'' * April 13 - [http://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/22x43p/cloud9_eclipse_won_the_first_challenger_playoffs/ Cloud9 Eclipse, Won the first Challenger Playoffs, AMA] ''with Reddit'' == External Links == == References ==
